title: Improved Prismarine Bricks!
description: Top and bottom textures of prismarine bricks have been changed to be more visually coherent.
body:
I've long been bothered that the top and bottom textures of default prismarine bricks seem to make no sense, and have largely avoided using them in my builds because of that, but I like the side texture, so I decided to do something about it. Now with this resource pack the top has a new texture, as does the bottom.

Feel free to use it on servers, in videos, or just for fun! all I ask is that you link back to this post if you showcase it. and if you want to showcase any of my work, don't be afraid to reach out and say hi! I'm a busy guy but I'll get back to you when I can.

As always, enjoy!
